ab: tima s huya wa ayuzi?
thithu naak a pan’amaan.
tima s huya wa binanau’az?
thithu naak a tantuqash binanau’az a minlhafut.
tima s huya wa azazak?
thithu naak a shashuazi ayuzi a minlhafut.
numa s kalawan mihu a ina wa palhkakrikriw?
ch: A:你的媽媽從事什麼工作?

ab: minkantashan thithu.
numa s kalawan mihu a ama wa palhkakrikriw?
ch: A:你的爸爸從事什麼工作?

ab: fuifuilh patashan a shinshii thithu.
thithu mihu a shashuazi ayuzi a minlhafut qa?
ani, thithu naak a shashuazi ayuzi a minlhafut a huruy.
ch: B:不是，他是我弟弟的朋友。
en: No, he is my younger brother’s friend.

ab: thithu mihu a tantuqash binanau’az a minlhafut qa?
ani, thithu naak a shashuazi binanau’az a minlhafut.
en: No, she is my younger sister.

ab: lapiza wa thau thaithuy tata wa taun?
en: How many people in their family?

ab: itia thaithuy tata wa taun larima wa thau.
en: There are five people in their family.

ab: lapiza wa azazak maniun a taun?
en: How many children in your family?

ab: iamin tata wa taun lashpaat a azazak.
en: There are four children in our family.

ab: lapiza s mihu a shashuazi a minlhafut?
en: How many younger siblings do you have?

ab: uka iaku tu shashuazi ayuzi a minlhafut numa itia shashuazi binanau’az a minlhafut laturu.
ch: B:我沒有弟弟，有三位妹妹。
en: I don’t have any younger brothers, but I have three younger sisters.

ab: lapiza s mihu a tantuqash a minlhafut?
en: How many older siblings do you have?

ab: uka iaku tu tantuqash a minlhafut.
en: I don’t have any older siblings.

ab: lapiza s mihu a minlhafut?
en: How many siblings do you have?

ab: uka iaku tu minlhafut.
minlhafut maniun qa?
ua, naak a tantuqash ayuzi a minlhafut thithu.
miniahala inai a thau maniun qa?
ua, miniahala inai a thau iamin.
Thau mani thithu qa?
ua, Thau mani thithu.
